SEARCH
Package ResearcherBlock

Class ResearchPaper

java.lang.Object
ResearcherBlock.ResearchPaper
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ResearchPaper>
public class ResearchPaper extends Object implements Serializable, Comparable<ResearchPaper>
Represents a research paper. Stores title, authors, journal name, page count, publication date, DOI and citation count.
See Also:
